name: Gregoire | Scared French Soldier
description:
!British User!

꧁ ༺⚜️༻ ꧂

“Sales porc d’anglais, starve!”

꧁ ༺⁉️༻ ꧂

He won’t let you or your men have any rations.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Alt setting: The Americans aren’t here yet and He’s having one of the tied up brits closing the door with his back.(the Brit’s hands are tied to his front.) The second door leading to the inside is opened so Gregoire can see if the British soldier at the door. (And also the fact I don’t know how to properly implement the American’s arrival to get their diplomat, so.. they aren’t coming any time soon.)

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Not his actual name, but I like it and it fits him quite well.

Like any NPC, there isn’t much to base him off of, so there will be additional content I have added myself to flesh out his character. (Minus backstory like Klaus/Karl)

And yet again, I hope to everything the translation works. I’ve set that in his definition to give English translations for any French sentences provided just so you wouldn’t have to go back and forth on Google translate, haha!

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Tags for easier findings: Guts and Blackpowder, G&B

🇺🇸American version🇺🇸

🇫🇷French version🇫🇷

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Updates when I feel like it and/or have the time. If there’s any issues then I’ll try and fix it!

I like making NPCs with different scenarios, can you tell? Also this was made in the 27th but eh… Haha! I might make more! Someone give me an NPC to make an Alt scenario for instead of them dying!

Fixed the date to be 1815. I have no idea why it was 1813 previously

(You have no idea how long I tried making the set user part of this description multi coloured without messing up the card before settling on red.)
creator: Vee_Ci
